name: Extra Quick Drop Cookies in Waffle Iron
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until light.
2. Beat in the sugar.
3. Add the eggs or Eggbeaters, vanilla, and dry ingredients. Beat until well mixed.
4. Heat the waffle iron for about 5 minutes.
5. Spray the waffle iron with a "pan coating" each time a new batch of cookies is baked to prevent sticking.
6. Drop heaping teaspoons of dough onto each section of the waffle iron (the dough should be about the size of a whole walnut). Do not spread out the dough.
7. Bake for 2-3 minutes.
8. These may also be baked on a greased cookie sheet at 325 degrees for 20 minutes. Makes 2 dozen cookies.
